story: An opening image introduces a anime in a world full of possibility. A sudden problem interrupts a anime and creates a clear mission. A anime follows a clue into a striking new place. A difficult choice tests a anime when the journey becomes dangerous. A anime discovers the courage needed to change the outcome.
